kv.memory.workflow-rule-every-small-code: Workflow rule: every small code-generation or fix Bead must be followed by two code-review passes before it is considered done. Add this explicitly to acceptance criteria for new codegen/fix Beads.
kv.memory.zephyr-builds-ec2: Zephyr Linux-only builds/tests can use AWS EC2 when local macOS or heft are insufficient. Local AWS profile: AdministratorAccess-921772462201. Persistent single-AZ EBS builder cache: vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 in us-east-2a, mount at /mnt/lichen-zephyr. It contains Zephyr SDK 0.16.8, west workspace pinned to Zephyr v3.7.0, Python venv, modules, ccache, and helper scripts. Attach it to a us-east-2a builder, mount via /mnt/lichen-zephyr/scripts/mount-volume.sh, source /mnt/lichen-zephyr/env.sh, then build. Use SSH and AWS API console output to watch boot/cloud-init. Keep temporary instances short-lived/tagged/terminated and detach the EBS volume cleanly when done.
